${"<" + "script"}>"use strict";let goecharts_1290314734383721111=echarts.init(document.getElementById("1290314734383721111"),"white",{renderer:"canvas"}),option_1290314734383721111={color:["#5470c6","#91cc75","#fac858","#ee6666","#73c0de","#3ba272","#fc8452","#9a60b4","#ea7ccc"],dataZoom:[{type:"slider"}],legend:{},series:[{name:"Size (bytes)",type:"bar",data:[{value:169623823},{value:169627182},{value:173312566},{value:173307958},{value:173471539},{value:173613558},{value:177303596},{value:173613558},{value:177316265},{value:178533863},{value:179223803},{value:179238407},{value:179768530},{value:179766590},{value:180187245},{value:180187245},{value:180218574},{value:183996129},{value:186926840}],markLine:{data:[{name:"Avg",type:"average",lineStyle:{color:"#91cc75",width:2}}]}}],title:{text:"Package size",subtext:"BenchmarkPackage/BenchmarkPackageSize"},toolbox:{show:!0,orient:"horizontal",right:"100",feature:{saveAsImage:{show:!0},dataZoom:{show:!0,icon:null,title:null},restore:{show:!0}}},tooltip:{},xAxis:[{data:["v0.14.0","v0.14.1","v0.15.0","v0.15.2","v0.16.0","v0.17.0","v0.18.0","v0.17.3","v0.18.2","v0.19.0","v0.20.0","v0.20.2","v0.21.0","v0.21.1","2025-05-02","2025-05-06","2025-05-07","2025-05-13","master"]}],yAxis:[{}]};goecharts_1290314734383721111.setOption(option_1290314734383721111)${"<" + "/script"}>
